summary: XAI (Explainable AI) module enhancements testing completed. All 14 test cases PASSED. The enhanced XAI module correctly renders all new charts (SHAP Summary Plot, Instance Details Panel, Feature vs Prediction scatter, Positive vs Negative LIME impact, Cluster Comparison, PCA Scatter, Feature Distribution per Cluster), section headers, gradient buttons, detailed descriptions, and tooltips. Dark mode works correctly with all charts visible.
passed_tests: TEST 1: PASSED - Load 'Loan Approval' dataset, select target 'approved', train model -> training succeeds (100% accuracy with Logistic Regression)

TEST 2: PASSED - Go to Explainability tab, click 'Run SHAP Analysis' -> all SHAP charts render: Global Feature Importance, SHAP Summary Plot, Beeswarm Plot, Instance Details Panel, Waterfall Plot, Force Plot, Dependence Plot, Feature vs Prediction scatter
TEST 3: PASSED - 'Global Explainability' section header appears above SHAP charts
TEST 4: PASSED - 'Local Explainability' section header appears above waterfall/force charts
TEST 5: PASSED - 'Feature Analysis' section header appears above dependence plots
TEST 6: PASSED - Switch to LIME tab, click 'Explain with LIME' -> Instance Explanation Panel, Feature Contribution Chart, Positive vs Negative Impact split, Probability Distribution all render
TEST 7: PASSED - Click 'Explain This Prediction (SHAP + LIME)' -> both tabs have data and 'SHAP vs LIME' comparison card renders in LIME tab with 'Comparison' section header
TEST 8: PASSED - All chart descriptions are 2-3 sentences of plain English explaining interpretation
TEST 9: PASSED - Load House Prices (regression), train -> go to Explainability -> Run SHAP -> all regression SHAP charts render correctly

TEST 10: PASSED - Run unsupervised analysis (no target) -> go to Explainability -> Cluster tab -> click 'Explain Clusters' -> Cluster Feature Influence, Cluster Comparison bar chart, PCA Scatter Plot, Feature Distribution per Cluster, Cluster SHAP Distribution beeswarm all render
TEST 11: PASSED - Gradient action buttons verified: violet gradient for SHAP, emerald for LIME, blue for clusters
TEST 12: PASSED - Tooltips on charts show data values when hovering (tested on Global Feature Importance - shows feature name, Mean |SHAP|, Rank)
TEST 13: PASSED - Dark mode toggle -> all charts remain visible and colors work in dark mode
TEST 14: PASSED - Clear Session -> all XAI data is cleared, 'No Model to Explain' message shown
critical_code_review_comments: XAI implementation is comprehensive and well-structured:
1. Scalable SHAP & LIME with sampling for large datasets (cap at 800 samples for >2000 rows)
2. Both supervised and unsupervised model support with separate Cluster Explanation tab
3. All new charts render correctly with detailed CardDescription text
4. Gradient section dividers (violet for Global, pink for Local, indigo for Feature Analysis, emerald for LIME, blue for Clusters)
5. Vibrant button gradients (violet-pink for SHAP, emerald-teal for LIME, blue-cyan for Clusters)
6. Tooltips work on all Recharts components
8. Session persistence includes all new XAI state variables (shapSummary, featureVsPred, clusterComparison)
seed_data_creation: Used built-in sample datasets: Loan Approval (20 rows, classification), House Prices (15 rows, regression)
context_for_next_testing_agent: XAI enhancements fully tested and working. Key data-testids: shap-global-importance, shap-summary-plot, shap-beeswarm, shap-instance-panel, shap-waterfall, shap-force, shap-dependence, shap-feature-vs-pred, lime-instance-panel, lime-contribution, lime-pos-neg, lime-probability, xai-side-by-side, cluster-feature-influence, cluster-comparison-chart, cluster-pca-scatter, cluster-feature-distribution. Section headers use gradient dividers. Buttons have colorful gradients. All charts have detailed descriptions. Dark mode works correctly.
